title: Billing provider error propagation + Sentry context + retry policy
discoveredDuring: SPEC-143 T-143-59 reframe — qzpay-core providerSyncErrorStrategy='log' default swallows MP API errors before they reach the route layer. Error mode differentiation, Sentry capture with billing context, and retry policy all require integration-level refactor, not just hospeda-side wiring.
